mapper.delete: /* PartnerUsimRegMapper.deleteUsimOrgMatch */ DELETE FROM MSP_USIM_ORG_MATCH WHERE WORK_DT = #{workDt}
mapper.insert: /* PartnerUsimRegMapper.insertAgentMatch */ INSERT INTO MSP_USIM_ORG_MATCH ( WORK_DT ,KT_ORG_ID ,ORGN_ID ) WITH DLVR_ORG_LIST AS ( SELECT DISTINCT DLVR_ORG_ID FROM MDS_INTM_DLVR_TXN WHERE FILE_NM = 'KIS_LO_ORDR_BY_INTM_DLVR_TXN_' || #{workDt} || '.DAT' ) SELECT #{workDt}, DLVR_ORG_ID, ORGN_ID FROM ( SELECT A.DLVR_ORG_ID, B.ORGN_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.DLVR_ORG_ID ORDER BY NULL) AS RN FROM DLVR_ORG_LIST A ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B WHERE A.DLVR_ORG_ID = B.KT_ORG_ID AND B.TYPE_CD = '20' ) WHERE RN = 1

/* PartnerUsimRegMapper.insertShopMatch */ INSERT INTO MSP_USIM_ORG_MATCH ( WORK_DT ,KT_ORG_ID ,ORGN_ID ) WITH DLVR_ORG_LIST AS ( SELECT DISTINCT A.DLVR_ORG_ID FROM MDS_INTM_DLVR_TXN A WHERE A.FILE_NM = 'KIS_LO_ORDR_BY_INTM_DLVR_TXN_' || #{workDt} || '.DAT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_USIM_ORG_MATCH WHERE WORK_DT = #{workDt} AND KT_ORG_ID = A.DLVR_ORG_ID) ) SELECT #{workDt}, DLVR_ORG_ID, ORGN_ID FROM ( SELECT A.DLVR_ORG_ID, C.ORGN_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.DLVR_ORG_ID ORDER BY B.EFCT_ST_DT) AS RN FROM DLVR_ORG_LIST A ,MDS_ORG_REL_INFO B ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE A.DLVR_ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND B.CPNT_ID = C.ORGN_ID AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN B.EFCT_ST_DT AND B.EFCT_FNS_DT ) WHERE RN = 1
